T0044.title: Application Submission
T0044.definition: The operational step of submitting a prepared loan application package to a financial institution’s approval system.
T0044.description: This is the critical juncture in the credit process where an application formally enters the review queue. In organized loan fraud, the submission stage often involves batch-uploading falsified documents, including fabricated corporate financial statements, personal bank statements, or fake housing provident fund records. Fraud rings use these packaged materials to systematically exploit specific risk-control rules and obtain high credit lines.
T0044.usageExample: All these profiles have been seasoned. We’re submitting the whole batch tonight—aiming for full approval.
